title: 500 Sheets Transparent Sticky Notes, 4 Sizes Clear Sticky Note, Self-Stick Note Pads, See Through Sticky Notes, Perfect for Writing in Text Books and Office
features: High-quality material: Made of high-quality PET paper, the paper is thick and high-quality to avoid ink smudges, very suitable for taking notes, sorting and organizing documents
Transparent: It can be pasted on books, magazines or documents to get the text you need to write. You can read the original text clearly when you write, which is very useful

Easy To Sticky: Our see through sticky note set is self-adhesive, with good stickiness, no need for any glue or tape help, and can be pasted anywhere you want. And it removes easily without leaving an unsightly residue on the surface you stick it on

Various Sizes: You can get 4 sizes of transparent sticky notes, which are 25x75 mm/0.98x2.95 inch, 50x75mm/1.96x2.95 inch, 75x75 mm/2.95x2.95 inch,70x95 mm/2.75x3.74 inch. Different sizes will meet your demands labeling or adding notes in your books
Widely Uses: Use for school, office, family. Great for leaving notes or reminders on walls, doors, fridge, monitors, or other surfaces
description: Product Description Hanyousheng 500 pcs transparent sticky notes are waterproof and durable, very suitable for home or office use. Package includes: 500 Sheets of Sticky Notes. 25x75mm x4（200 in total） 50x75mm x2（100 in total） 75x75mm x2（100 in total） 70x95mm x2（100 in total） Features: See through notes call attention to information without covering text. Portable size,can be carry in your bag or pocket to anywhere.Mark down things to do on the notes,easy to view at any time and remind you to do it in time. Tracing paper feature helps you draw and trace any images to bring creative ideas for life. Removes cleanly without leaving a sticky residue. Note: The transparent sticky notes should write with oil-based markers, pencils, ballpoint pens, NOT gel pens or markers. Use for school, office, family. Great for leaving notes or reminders on walls, doors, fridge, monitors, or other surfaces.
